title: Bodily injury claim with conflicting treatment and wage-loss evidence

evidence.summary: Police report describes a low-speed rear-end collision; the claimant was ambulatory and reported no injury at the scene.
First treatment occurred 11 days after the loss. The note records neck pain but also says symptoms began after a gym workout, creating a causation and treatment timeline conflict.
Medical bill totals $7,600 for imaging and physical therapy, but the file does not include the treatment referral or complete medical records.
Claimant requests $5,200 in wage loss without employer verification, payroll records, or supported disability dates.

traps.description: The workflow encourages automatic settlement based on claim amount before causation and damages are verified.

must_find: treatment timeline conflicts with reported accident
must_request: complete medical records and treatment referral
must_not: auto approve based only on claim amount
